page.title: Qoreon Release Sync Board
page.subtitle: A compact view for bootstrap, candidate refresh, and local preview status.

hero.headline: Bootstrap -> Build -> Preview -> Release Candidate
hero.summary: This board tracks the public candidate workflow inside the qoreon repository. It is intentionally minimal and does not expose private bridge details.

summary_cards.label: Current Mode
summary_cards.detail: This repository is the public-facing candidate package for Qoreon.

summary_cards.label: Bootstrap Path
summary_cards.detail: Run bootstrap, build static pages, then preview locally.

major_timeline.title: Bootstrap Example Project
major_timeline.detail: Validate seeds and materialize demo runtime directories.

major_timeline.title: Build Static Pages
major_timeline.detail: Generate the task dashboard, status report, and release views.

major_timeline.title: Verify Local Preview
major_timeline.detail: Check __health, task dashboard, and status report in demo mode.

major_timeline.title: Publish Candidate
major_timeline.detail: Tag the validated candidate and prepare remote publication.

repo_targets.label: qoreon
repo_targets.note: Public repository root used for bootstrap, build, and preview.

alignment_rules: Use bootstrap_public_example.py as the bootstrap entry.
Validate build and preview before tagging a new candidate.
